title: adenostemma goyazense
intro: Adenostemma goyazense, also known as 'African Bluebells', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Adenostemma goyazense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture, and its leaves and flowers are used to make medicinal extracts.
